question_intent: Total number of unique providers that had charges in the 'Travel' category and whose members made payments in the same month as the charge date

plan.question_intent: Total number of unique providers that had charges in the 'Travel' category and whose members made payments in the same month as the charge date

blocks.name: leaf_1
join_clauses: JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
blocks.notes: Providers with charges in 'Travel' category and matching payments in the same month

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: Final scalar block counting unique providers

build_logs.notes: Providers with charges in 'Travel' category and matching payments in the same month

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: LEFT JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
WHERE (c.category_no = 1)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
WHERE (c.category_no = 3)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
WHERE (c.category_no = 3) AND (strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', pay.payment_dt))
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', pay.payment_dt) OR pay.payment_dt IS NULL
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
WHERE (c.category_no = 3) AND (strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', pay.payment_dt) OR pay.payment_dt IS NULL)
LIMIT 5

SELECT c.provider_no, c.charge_dt, p.provider_name
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
WHERE (c.category_no = 3) AND (strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', pay.payment_dt) OR pay.payment_dt IS NULL)
GROUP BY c.provider_no, c.charge_dt, p.provider_name

build_logs.notes: Final scalar block counting unique providers

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.provider_no, c.charge_dt, p.provider_name
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
WHERE (c.category_no = 3) AND (strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', pay.payment_dt) OR pay.payment_dt IS NULL)
GROUP BY c.provider_no, c.charge_dt, p.provider_name) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT provider_no) AS unique_providers
FROM (SELECT c.provider_no, c.charge_dt, p.provider_name
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS pay ON m.member_no = pay.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
WHERE (c.category_no = 3) AND (strftime('%Y-%m', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y-%m', pay.payment_dt) OR pay.payment_dt IS NULL)
GROUP BY c.provider_no, c.charge_dt, p.provider_name) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, m.member_no, m.region_no, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS p ON c.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN corporation AS co ON m.corp_no = co.corp_no
WHERE (co.region_no IN (1, 2, 3, 4)) AND (strftime('%Y', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y', p.payment_dt) OR p.payment_no IS NULL)) AS leaf_1

question: How many unique providers have at least one charge in category 3 where, for each charge date, either no payment exists for the member or the payment month matches the charge month?
